title: FAA-N06 适用范围 / Who FAA-N06 applies to
point: 依 MAS Act 1970 s27B 发布,适用于持牌 FA、依 s23(1)(c) 豁免的注册保险经纪、依 s23(1)(f) 豁免人士;仅做研究报告者除外。 / Issued under s27B MAS Act 1970; applies to licensed FAs, brokers exempt under s23(1)(c), and persons exempt under s23(1)(f) — research-only providers excluded.
keyfacts: 研究分析/报告类提供者豁免 / Research-only providers excluded

title: 匿名/假名账户 / Anonymous accounts
point: 财务顾问不得开立或维持匿名账户或假名账户。 / An FA must not open or maintain an anonymous or fictitious-name account.
keyfacts: FAA-N06 para 6.1 绝对禁止 / Absolute prohibition (6.1)

title: 何时须执行 CDD / When CDD is required
point: 建立业务关系时、怀疑洗钱/恐怖融资时、或对先前信息真实性/充分性存疑时,须执行 CDD。 / CDD is required on establishing relations, on suspicion of ML/TF, or on doubts about the veracity/adequacy of earlier information.
keyfacts: 三大触发情形 (6.3) / Three triggers (6.3)

title: 客户身份识别信息 / Customer identification data
point: 至少取得:全名(含别名)、唯一识别号、住址/营业地址、出生或成立日期、国籍或注册地。 / Obtain at least: full name (incl. aliases), unique ID number, residential/business address, date of birth/establishment, nationality/place of registration.
keyfacts: 须以可靠独立来源核实身份 (6.8) / Verify from reliable independent sources (6.8)

title: 受益所有人 / Beneficial owner
point: 最终拥有或控制客户、或代其行事的自然人;须识别并以合理措施核实其身份,除非属 6.15 豁免类别(如新交所上市并交易实体)。 / The natural person who ultimately owns/controls the customer; must be identified and reasonably verified unless within a 6.15 exemption (e.g. an entity listed and traded on SGX).
keyfacts: 上市并交易于 SGX 的实体可豁免询问 BO / SGX-listed-and-traded entity exempt from BO inquiry

title: 简化 CDD 禁用情形 / When SDD is barred
point: 低风险可做 SDD;但客户/BO 来自 FATF 反制国、来自 AML/CFT 不足国、或怀疑涉 ML/TF 时,一律不得 SDD。 / SDD allowed for low risk, but barred where the customer/BO is from a FATF-countermeasure country, an inadequate-AML/CFT country, or ML/TF is suspected.
keyfacts: 三类情形禁用 SDD (7.4) / Three bars to SDD (7.4)

title: PEP 的加强 CDD / EDD for PEPs
point: 对 PEP 及其家庭成员/密切关系人,除一般 CDD 外须:取得高管批准、查明财富与资金来源、进行加强监控。 / For PEPs and their family/close associates, beyond ordinary CDD: obtain senior-management approval, establish source of wealth and funds, and conduct enhanced monitoring.
keyfacts: 三项强制 EDD 措施 (8.3) / Three mandatory EDD measures (8.3)

title: 依赖第三方 / Reliance on third parties
point: 可依赖合格第三方执行第 6/7/8 段措施,但不得依赖第三方进行持续监控;FA 仍对自身 AML/CFT 义务负责。 / May rely on an eligible third party for paragraph 6/7/8 measures, but NOT for ongoing monitoring; the FA remains responsible for its own AML/CFT obligations.
keyfacts: 持续监控不可外包 (9.3) / Ongoing monitoring cannot be relied out (9.3)
须立即取得第三方所得 CDD 信息 (9.4) / Obtain CDD info immediately (9.4)

title: 记录保存期 / Record retention period
point: CDD/账户/通信/分析记录:业务关系终止后至少 5 年;交易记录:交易完成后至少 5 年。 / CDD/account/correspondence/analysis records: at least 5 years after termination of relations; transaction records: at least 5 years after completion.
keyfacts: 两类记录均为至少 5 年 (10.3) / Both at least 5 years (10.3)

title: STR 与 tipping-off / STR and tipping-off
point: 可疑交易(含未遂)无论金额须立即向 STRO 提交并抄送 MAS;注意 CDSA 第 48 条禁止通风报信。 / Suspicious transactions (incl. attempted), regardless of amount, must be promptly reported to STRO with a copy to MAS; CDSA s48 prohibits tipping-off.
keyfacts: 无金额门槛 / No monetary threshold (12.2)
STRO = 商业事务局可疑交易报告办公室 / STRO is the Suspicious Transaction Reporting Office
sourceRef: MAS Notice FAA-N06 para 12.2–12.4; CDSA s48
